title: antidesma coriifolium
intro: Antidesma coriifolium, also known as the Coriifolia or Coriophora, is a species of plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Antidesma coriifolium include the potential treatment of fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its use as an antiseptic to promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves are often made into tea or infusions, and its roots are used to create infusions or decoctions, which are consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
